Lumify
Table of Contents

Class NotesController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Manages notes and their content modules — text blocks and link items — both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared. Covers creating, editing, moving, ordering and deleting notes and modules, plus various queries. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace notes are pushed live to the workspace group over the NoteHub.

[ApiController]
[Route("notes/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class NotesController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
NotesController

Remarks

A note is a container; its body is an ordered list of modules positioned via NotePos. Deleting a note cascades a soft-delete to all of its modules and attachments. Permission rule throughout: a personal note may only be modified by its owner, a workspace note by any active member (see CanModify).

Constructors

NotesController(ILogger<NotesController>, LumifyDbContext, IHubContext<NoteHub>)

Creates the controller with its injected logger, database context and the note hub used for live notifications.

public NotesController(ILogger<NotesController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, IHubContext<NoteHub> noteHub)

Parameters

logger ILogger<NotesController>
db LumifyDbContext
noteHub IHubContext<NoteHub>

Methods

AddLinkItem(AddLinkItemRequest, CancellationToken)

Appends a link item module (labelled URL) to a note, placed at the end (next free NotePos).

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addLinkItem")]
public Task<ActionResult<LinkItemResponse>> AddLinkItem(AddLinkItemRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddLinkItemRequest

Link item data including the parent note ID, URL and optional label.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<LinkItemResponse>>

200 with the created link item; 400 if the note ID or URL is missing; 403 if the user may not modify the note; 404 if the note does not exist.

Remarks

On success in a workspace, a LinkItemCreated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

AddNote(AddNoteRequest, CancellationToken)

Creates a new (empty) note, optionally inside a workspace and/or a folder.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addNote")]
public Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>> AddNote(AddNoteRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddNoteRequest

Note data (name required; optional workspace and folder).

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>>

200 with the created note; 400 on missing name or invalid workspace/folder; 403 if the user is not a member of the target workspace or owner of the folder.

Remarks

If a workspace is given, the user must be a member; if a folder is given, it must live in the same space. On success in a workspace, a NoteCreated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

AddTextBlock(AddTextBlockRequest, CancellationToken)

Appends a text block module (text, heading, code, …) to a note, placed at the end (next free NotePos).

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addTextBlock")]
public Task<ActionResult<TextblockResponse>> AddTextBlock(AddTextBlockRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddTextBlockRequest

Text block data including the parent note ID, type and content.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TextblockResponse>>

200 with the created text block; 400 if the note ID is missing; 403 if the user may not modify the note; 404 if the note does not exist.

Remarks

On success in a workspace, a TextBlockCreated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

DeleteLinkItem(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a single link item from its note.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteLinkItem")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteLinkItem(string linkItemID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

linkItemID string

The link item to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the link item ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not modify the note; 404 if the link item or its parent note does not exist.

Remarks

On a workspace note, a LinkItemDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group; the parent note's timestamp is bumped.

DeleteNote(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a note together with all of its modules (text blocks, link items) and attachments.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteNote")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteNote(string noteID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

noteID string

The note to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the note ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not delete it; 404 if the note does not exist.

Remarks

Everything is kept and marked with DeletedAt. On a workspace note, a NoteDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group.

DeleteTextBlock(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a single text block from its note.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteTextBlock")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteTextBlock(string textblockID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

textblockID string

The text block to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the text block ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not modify the note; 404 if the block or its parent note does not exist.

Remarks

On a workspace note, a TextBlockDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group; the parent note's timestamp is bumped.

GetAllNotesOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns all personal notes (no workspace) of the current user, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllNotesOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<NoteResponse>>> GetAllNotesOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<NoteResponse>>>

200 with the list of notes.

GetAllNotesOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all notes of a workspace, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllNotesOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<NoteResponse>>> GetAllNotesOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace whose notes are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<NoteResponse>>>

200 with the list of notes.

Remarks

Notes whose creator was soft-deleted are kept (content belongs to the workspace) and surface the creator as "Gelöschter Benutzer".

GetLinkItemsOfNote(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all link items of a note, in display order (NotePos).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getLinkItemsOfNote")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<LinkItemResponse>>> GetLinkItemsOfNote(string noteID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

noteID string

The note whose link items are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<LinkItemResponse>>>

200 with the ordered link items; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the note does not exist.

GetNoteCountOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the number of personal notes (no workspace) owned by the current user.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getNoteCountOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<int>> GetNoteCountOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<int>>

200 with the note count.

GetNoteCountOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the number of notes in a workspace. The user must be a member.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getNoteCountOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<int>> GetNoteCountOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace to count notes for.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<int>>

200 with the note count; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user is not a member; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

GetNoteWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns a single note by its ID (metadata only; modules are fetched separately).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getNoteWithID")]
public Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>> GetNoteWithID(string noteID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

noteID string

The note to look up.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>>

200 with the note; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if it does not exist.

GetTextBlocksOfNote(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all text blocks of a note, in display order (NotePos).

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getTextBlocksOfNote")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<TextblockResponse>>> GetTextBlocksOfNote(string noteID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

noteID string

The note whose text blocks are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<TextblockResponse>>>

200 with the ordered text blocks; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the note does not exist.

SaveNote(SaveNoteRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates a note's name and/or its folder (move). Only provided fields are changed, and the database is only written if something changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveNote")]
public Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>> SaveNote(SaveNoteRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveNoteRequest

The note ID plus the fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<NoteResponse>>

200 with the updated note; 400 on invalid input or move target; 403 if the user may not modify it; 404 if the note does not exist.

Remarks

Move rules: a personal note may only move into another personal folder of the same owner; a workspace note may only move within the same workspace; an empty folder ID moves the note to the root. On a successful change in a workspace, a NoteUpdated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

SaveTextBlock(SaveTextblockRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates a text block's type, name, content, code language, collapsed state and/or position. Only provided fields are changed, and the database is only written if something changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveTextBlock")]
public Task<ActionResult<TextblockResponse>> SaveTextBlock(SaveTextblockRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveTextblockRequest

The text block ID plus the fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TextblockResponse>>

200 with the updated text block; 400 on invalid input (e.g. negative position); 403 if the user may not modify the note; 404 if the block or its parent note does not exist.

Remarks

Changing NotePos reorders the block within the note. On a successful change in a workspace, a TextBlockUpdated event is broadcast to the workspace group; the parent note's timestamp is bumped too.

getSpaceInfosOfNote(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the workspace that the given note belongs to, if any.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getSpaceInfosOfNote")]
public Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>> getSpaceInfosOfNote(string noteID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

noteID string

The note whose workspace is requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>>

200 with the workspace; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the note has no linked workspace or it was deleted.
